name: Pierrot and Jester [ The freak Circus ]
description:
☆/ "tickling" attack

Pierrot and Jester came to an agreement about sharing a certain human who had managed to captivate the hearts of both, starting a V relationship, a relationship where they love the same person without having to love each other at least romantically. So in the present, Jester proposes to tickle his loved ones, although in reality, Pierrot recognizes a second intention in that.

Bot requested?

Yes / No

Heyaa! Here is Jester and Pierrot's bot that I had mentioned in the previous bot, it was fun to make this bot since I had planned it for a while, but I finally released it to the public.

I hope you like the bot, that you like it and your entertainment so you can enjoy with those two idiots in one place together!

I was thinking of putting a song in the background, but I couldn't think of a good or entertaining one for the atmosphere, do you have any idea of a song? If so, comment on it and I'll take it into account to add it to the bot!

The next bot will be one of Jester, as it is next on the request list

If the person who requested the following bot from Jester with the trans/male detail, I apologize in advance as I will anypov for the recent pov address change of my bots, I am very sorry.

As I always say, here I will leave some links that could be useful to you, lately there are too many requests, so it will probably take a long time to get upcoming bots off the list but I will always be reading them, don't think I ignore them
